creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
I include a compressed file uuencode - hope it gets not mangled
otherwise please tell me. gzip from archivers/gzip should be able
to uncompress it:

olivleh1@kartoffel olivleh1> /usr/local/bin/gzip --decompress \
--stdout yacc.1.Z
.TH YACC 1 WEGA
.\" @[$]yacc.1  1.2
.ad
.fi
.SH NAME
yacc \- Compiler-Compiler
[...]


begin 644 yacc.1.Z
